zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Pontop於1263年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Thomas de Pontop24歲，母親Lady Constance De Felton15歲。她於大約1295年與William de Felton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Pontop于1263年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Thomas de Pontop24岁，母亲Lady Constance De Felton15岁。她于大约1295年与William de Felton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pontop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name, probably from Great and Little Ponton in Lincolnshire, perhaps named from an obscure Old English word pamp ‘hill’ or panne ‘pan’ (in a transferred topographic sense ‘depression, hollow’) + tūn ‘farmstead’, ‘enclosure’.
English: occasionally a variant of   Ponting  .

variants.name: Ponting
meanings: from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Punting, PontingPointing (Old English Punting), a pet form of Punta.
occasionally perhaps a variant of Panting, itself a variant of either Penton or Panton .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Pontop was born in 1263, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Pontop, was 24 and her mother, Lady Constance De Felton, was 15. She married William de Felton about 1295, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1328, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Pontop est née en 1263, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Pontop, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Constance De Felton, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William de Felton environ 1295, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1328, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Pontop 1263 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Pontop 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Constance De Felton 15. Sie hat um 1295 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom William de Felton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1328 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Pontop è nata il nel 1263 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Pontop, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Constance De Felton, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William de Felton circa 1295, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1328, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Pontopが1263年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Pontopは24歳，母Lady Constance De Feltonは15歳であった。約1295年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでWilliam de Feltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Pontop(이)가 1263년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Pontop(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Constance De Felton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 William de Felton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Pontop nasceu em 1263, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Pontop, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Constance De Felton, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Felton aproximadamente 1295, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1328, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Pontop родилась в 1263 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Pontop было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Constance De Felton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Felton около 1295 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1328 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Pontop nació en 1263, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Pontop, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Constance De Felton, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William de Felton aproximadamente 1295, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1328, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
